updates.prompt: Some of this should have wrestling story and in ring action still but from god within Mode camera angles and play style but should have some wrestling matches shoes ple and promos and storyline etc... add more choices and in between mdicke chances to fight random ppl backstage and shift the story... Do we route into the wrecked office to find what Onyx left behind or do we head back down to the Gorilla Position to trigger the next roster encounter?
updates.action_taken: Added the remaining Act 3 environments and transitions to the physical open-world space: Hospitality Suite, Loading Bay Handoff (Finxsse / Ronin shift), Freight Elevator (Titan Chained Remix), Server Farm (Zephyr Enforcer Remix), Main Event PLE (Stan Combs & Nikolai Petrenko). Expanded MDickie-style roaming mechanics to allow unprovoked backstage combat in Concrete Bowels, Loading Dock Tunnels, Equipment Lock-Up, and Interview Set. Incorporated grounded psychological transformations instead of magic for Rey Fuego, Cassian Thorne, Kenji Kaneshiro, and Nikolai Petrenko. Placed Onyx in the Executive Corridor as a major narrative chokepoint/fork.
